use.flag: Enable support for Wayland display server

pkgmetadata.longdescription:
Claude is an AI assistant made by Anthropic. This package provides the official desktop application for Claude, allowing users to interact with the AI assistant directly from their desktop environment.
Features: - Latest Claude models - MCP (Model Context Protocol) support - Integration with local tools and utilities - Cross-platform compatibility (Linux, macOS, Windows)
This ebuild provides two installation options: 1. Live build (9999) - Always downloads the latest source from GitHub 2. Stable versions - Use pre-compiled binaries from release archives
Requires Node.js 18+ and Python 3.10+
